mapper.select:
SELECT un.id, un.user_id, un.sort_type, un.content, un.created_at, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages FROM user_notes un LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = un.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND un.`sort_type` = #{queryFrom.sortType}
ORDER BY un.created_at DESC
